prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-CAMPMAT-MAT-CAMP06 Product Type: SLEEPING_MAT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Foam Camping Hiking Waterproof Sleeping Pad Yoga Mat 72 x 24 Inch Description: Are you looking to go on an overnight outdoor camping or hiking adventure, but worried about the aches and pains the next day from sleeping on a hard surface? Look no further than the ASR Outdoor Camping Mat.

This super lightweight and easy-to-pack foam sleeping mat provides needed sleep support and comfort without the extra weight or added bulk to your backpacking, trekking, hiking, or camping gear, equipment, and supplies. The long 72-inch length, waterproof and non-slip sleeping mat is ideal for full-grown adults or kids and offers protection from cold wet surfaces. And, the carry straps make it easy to tote or attach to other gear when you're on the move.

Plus, this multipurpose high-density foam mat does not need to be saved just for the mountains; it can also be used in everyday activities. Take it with you to the gym or yoga studio for stability while exercising. Or use it around the house, garage, or outside in the garden giving your back and knees support to prevent aches and pains at the end of the day.

Give your back, neck, hips, and feet a much-needed break after a long outdoor adventure. The foam camping mat gives a tired body some extra comfort and support while you gear up for the next day's wilderness adventures. Search Terms: camping mats sleeping pads outdoor mat hiking supplies backpacking RV camp tent bag foam essentials for waterproof sleep Features: - PORTABLE COMFORT TO GO - Camping, overnight hiking or backpacking, this lightweight sleeping pad with handy carrying straps makes the camping mat easily portable and won't add any extra weight to your gear, supplies and equipment - NON-SLIP WATERPROOF DESIGN - The non-slip and waterproof design of this dense foam sleeping pad or camping mat provides stability and reassurance that you'll sleep comfortably and avoid ground surface moisture when it comes time to catch some Z's - PROVIDES ADDED SLEEP SUPPORT - Give your back, neck, hips and feet a much needed break after a long outdoor adventure! The foam camping mat gives a tired body some extra comfort and support while you gear up for the next day's wilderness adventures - MULTIPURPOSE PAD - Besides being a great sleeping mat while hiking, camping or backpacking, the ASR Outdoor foam pad mat is a multipurpose product that can be used as a gym or yoga mat for exercise, for knee support while working in the garage, garden or around the house; easily roll it up and take it go! - SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 72 (L) x 24 (W) x 0.25 (H) inches; Material: High density non-slip foam; Thickness: 0.25 inches; Carrying Strap Width: 0.75 inches; Color: Light Blue; To Clean: Wipe with wet or dry cloth === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 72x24 Light Blue Foam Camping Sleeping Mat

anthropic.title_differentiation: Waterproof Non-Slip, Lightweight Portable, Yoga And Gym Use, High Density Foam Support
